hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 500 m from property

snippets.snippet: Easy walking distance to all attractions.
The breakfast is very good as well.

address.address1: Jl. Jend. Ahmad Yani No.17, Peunayong, Kec. Kuta Alam, Kota Banda Aceh, Aceh

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.6/10 on value for money

usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The location of the hotel in Medan Peunayong is very strategic, close to dining options and places to shop for souvenirs, and the service is good.
comments.originalComment: Letak hotel medan Peunayong sangat strategis dekat dengan kuliner, dan tempat belanja oleh-oleh serta pelayanan bagus

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The service at the Medan hotel is good. The location is strategic, close to culinary spots and souvenir shops. I will stay again later.
comments.originalComment: Pelayanan di hotel medan bagus. Lokasinya strategis dekat dengan tempat kuliner dan tempat jual oleh-oleh. Nanti nginap lagi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Friendly and very helpful staff. Spacious room, very comfortable. The air conditioning is also cool. Definitely recommended.
comments.originalComment: Staff ramah dan sangat membantu. Kamar luas, sangat nyaman. ACC juga dingin.  Recommended lah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The location of the hotel in Medan Peunayong is close to culinary spots and places selling souvenirs and Aceh's special products.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi hotel medan Peunayong bna dekat dengan tempat kuliner dan jual souvenir dan eh oleh khas Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel has a strategic location with friendly staff all around; if there is a business trip, I highly recommend this hotel.
comments.originalComment: lokasi hotel strategis dengan staff yang ramah semuanya, jika ada perjalanan bisnis hotel ini sangat saya rekomendasikan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: An iconic and fairly classic hotel, a silent witness to the tsunami disaster, and it has complete facilities.
comments.originalComment: Hotel yg ikonik dan lumayan classic, jdi saksi bisu bencana tsunami, dan disini fasilitasnya lengkap.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good clean news, strategic location, but during high season please add more breakfast. Knowing that there are many guests during high season, it actually feels a bit risky that some won't get breakfast even though it's still breakfast time.
comments.originalComment: Good kabar bersih, lokasi strategis cuma kalau lagi high season tolong dong ditambahi sarapannya. Sudah tau high season banyak tamu malah sedikit jadi taku pada gak kebagian sarapan padahal masih di jam nya sarapan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Sesuai buged

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: cukup nyaman untuk istirahat, tempatnya bersih sarapan pagi variatif... recommend

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The surrounding environment is good and quiet. The accommodation is decent for the price. The breakfast is disappointing. Oh! There is hot water.
comments.originalComment:
주변 환경도 괜찮고 조용합니다. 가격대비 숙소도 괜찮습니다. 조식은 아쉬워요. 
아 ! 따뜻한 물이 나와요.

comments.reviewTitle: Old but still okay with good price

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Overall okay, there aren't many food options around the hotel.
comments.originalComment: Secara keseluruhan Ok, untuk cari makanan sekitaran Hotel tdk banyak pilihan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The parking area is spacious and attractive because there is a coffee shop in the parking area.
comments.originalComment: Parkiran luas dan menarik sebab di area parkir ada coffee shop ya

comments.reviewComments: The television's picture is still old-fashioned.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Dear Mr./Ms. Wei Fan,
Thank you for choosing Hotel Medan Banda Aceh for your stay.
It was a pleasure to have you with us, and we hope you had a pleasant experience.
We look forward to welcoming you again.

Thank you for staying with us,
Warm regards,
Hotel Medan Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The hygiene is good, the facilities are average, the service is nice, and I will book this hotel again next time.
comments.originalComment: 卫生整洁，设施一般，服务不错，下次来还会预定这间酒店

comments.reviewComments: Clean and staff friendly

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Great value for money. Clean and comfortable rooms. Easy walking distance to all attractions. I already stayed here several times: The breakfast is now very much better again than 6 months ago! Thank you.
comments.reviewTitle: My favourite Hotel in Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel Medan has been a great hotel in Banda Aceh for decades. It's clean and friendly with spacious room for an affordable price. The breakfast is very good as well. I highly recommend.
comments.reviewTitle: Great place to stay in Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A long time favourite Hotel in Banda Aceh. Rooms are clean and spacious. Staff is very friendly. Breakfast was not as good as usual this time.
comments.reviewTitle: Great place to stay in the City Center
